math_ug_104: 25 ducks were taken away, so the number of ducks is 250 - 25 = 225. Let the number of chickens be x. Then x/4 = 225, so x = 225 * 4 = 900. Then x = 4(y - 25). Substituting y = 250 - x, we get x = 4(250 - x - 25) = 4(225 - x) = 900 - 4x. So 5x = 900, and x = 180. The number of chickens is 180. The number of ducks is 250 - 180 = 70.
